creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

devel/libtool15 does not install the ltdl libraries.  You want 
devel/libtldl15 for that (which is automatically pulled in for other 
ports that require it using the relevant USE_AUTOTOOLS stanza, as 
documented in the porters handbook and Mk/bsd.autotools.mk
